name: Fingerstyle Fundamentals — Fall 2025
description: An 8-week workshop introducing fingerstyle acoustic guitar technique: thumb independence, alternating bass lines, simple melody embedding, and basic pattern reading. No prior fingerstyle experience required; open chords assumed.

name: Travis Picking Intensive — Winter 2026
description: A 6-week deep dive into Travis (thumb-brush) picking: alternating bass with syncopated melody, Chet Atkins style variations, and arranging familiar tunes in the pattern. Prerequisite: Fingerstyle Fundamentals or equivalent.

name: DADGAD Explorations — Fall 2025
description: A 6-week workshop exploring the DADGAD open tuning: retuning safely, Celtic and folk drone voicings, open-string ornaments, and arranging in this resonant modal landscape. Intermediate fingerstyle players welcome.

name: Fingerstyle Fundamentals — Fall 2026
description: Return offering of the foundational 8-week fingerstyle workshop. New intake of students for Fall 2026 cohort at Dragonfly Music Center.

name: Private Lesson Students — 2025-26
description: Shared resource space for Gerald's ongoing private guitar students. Includes practice logs, recorded demo videos, tablature packets, and lesson scheduling links.

name: Chesapeake Acoustic Collective — Shared Materials
description: Internal workspace for the Chesapeake Acoustic Collective ensemble. Setlists, lead sheets, rehearsal notes, and gig logistics for the 2025-26 season shared with Chris, Marcus, and Dana.

name: Travis Picking Intensive — Fall 2026
description: Second offering of the Travis Picking Intensive for Fall 2026 students. Registration opens January 2026.
